Bob Dylan
Reunion Arena
Dallas, Texas
February 22, 2002

Unknown lineage and origin.Drop on "intro" at 0.58 ."Sumer days" cut at the start.
good sound

Disc 1
Intro
Duncan & Brady
Don't Think Twice, It's Alright
It's Alright Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
Searching for a Soldier's Grave
Maggie's Farm
You Ain't Goin' Nowhere
Cry a While
High Water (for Charley Patton)
Visions of Johanna
Boots of Spanish Leather
Tangled Up In Blue

Disc 2
Summer Days
Sugar Baby
Cold Irons Bound
Rainy Day Women #12 & 35
Like a Rolling Stone
Honest With Me
Blowin' In the Wind
All Along the Watchtower


Concert # 1399 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 16 of the 2002 US Winter Tour. 2002 concert # 16.

 

Concert # 16 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

 

1–4, 9–11, 18 acoustic with the band.

 

2, 4, 6, 9, 18 Bob Dylan (harmonica).

 

3 Larry Campbell (cittern).

 

1, 4, 18 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).
